name: 4 in 1 [90°/ 180° Degree Rotation] USB 3.0 Hub, Multi-Port Adapter with 3 USB Ports and 1 USB C Power and Data Port, USB 3.0 Hub Compatible with Laptop/Table/Cellphone/Keyboard/Printer/MacBook
shortName: 4 in 1 [90°/ 180° Degree Rotation] USB 3.0 Hub, Multi-Port Adapter
description: A 4-in-1 USB 3.0 hub with rotatable design featuring 3 USB ports and 1 USB-C power/data port for multiple devices.
